SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.java

Class JkManifest

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.java.JkManifest
public final class JkManifest extends Object
Wrapper class on Manifest providing utility methods.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    BUILD_JDK
    The JDK version who was running while building this manifest.
    static final String
    BUILD_TIME
     
    static final String
    CREATED_BY
    The software that has created this manifest.
    static final String
    IMPLEMENTATION_TITLE
    The title of the implementation.
    static final String
    IMPLEMENTATION_VENDOR
    The version of the implementation.
    static final String
    IMPLEMENTATION_VERSION
    The version of the implementation.
    static final String
    STANDARD_LOCATION
    The path where generally belongs all manifest past (relative to archive root)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JkManifest
    addBuildInfo()
    Fills this manifest with contextual infoString : CREATED_BY, BUILT_BY and BUILD_JDK

    Adds implementation-* information to the JkManifest.

    Adds the 'Main-Class' attribute to this manifest.
    String

    Returns a trimmed string representation of the manifest, removing tailing empty line

    Returns the value of the main attribute having the specified name.
    String

    Returns the value of the main attribute having the specified name.
    Manifest
    getManifest()
    Returns the underlying JDK Manifest object.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Returns true if this manifest has no entry or has only "Manifest-Version" entry.

    loadFromClass(Class<?> clazz)
    Loads the manifest from the jar or the base class directory the specified class belongs to.
    JkManifest

    Loads the manifest file from the specified path and set it as the underlying manifest.

    Loads the manifest from the specified input stream and set it as the underlying manifest.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkManifest of()
      Creates an empty JkManifest

    • getManifest

      public Manifest getManifest()
      Returns the underlying JDK Manifest object.

    • set

      public JkManifest set(Manifest manifest)
      Set the underlying Manifest with the specified one.

    • loadFromFile

      public JkManifest loadFromFile(Path file)
      Loads the manifest file from the specified path and set it as the underlying manifest.

    • loadFromJar

      public JkManifest loadFromJar(Path jar)

    • loadFromInputStream

      public JkManifest loadFromInputStream(InputStream inputStream)
      Loads the manifest from the specified input stream and set it as the underlying manifest.

    • loadFromClass

      public JkManifest loadFromClass(Class<?> clazz)
      Loads the manifest from the jar or the base class directory the specified class belongs to.

    • addMainAttribute

      public JkManifest addMainAttribute(Attributes.Name key, String value)
      Adds the specified attributes in the "main" attributes section. This method return this object.

    • addMainAttribute

      public JkManifest addMainAttribute(String key, String value)
      See Also:
      • addMainAttribute(Name, String)

    • addMainClass

      public JkManifest addMainClass(String value)
      Adds the 'Main-Class' attribute to this manifest. This method returns this object.

    • addImplementationInfo

      public JkManifest addImplementationInfo(JkModuleId moduleId, JkVersion version)
      Adds implementation-* information to the JkManifest. t.

    • addBuildInfo

      public JkManifest addBuildInfo()
      Fills this manifest with contextual infoString : CREATED_BY, BUILT_BY and BUILD_JDK

    • getMainAttribute

      public String getMainAttribute(String key)
      Returns the value of the main attribute having the specified name.

    • getMainAttribute

      public String getMainAttribute(Attributes.Name name)
      Returns the value of the main attribute having the specified name.

    • merge

      public JkManifest merge(Manifest other)
      Adds attributes of the specified manifest to this one. This manifest attributes are overridden by those of the specified one if same attribute exist.

    • writeToStandardLocation

      public void writeToStandardLocation(Path classDir)
      Writes this manifest at the standard place (META-INF/MANIFEST.MF) of the specified directory.

    • writeTo

      public void writeTo(Path file)

    • asString

      public String asString()

    • asTrimedString

      public String asTrimedString()
      Returns a trimmed string representation of the manifest, removing tailing empty line
      Returns:
      a trimmed string representation of the manifest

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if this manifest has no entry or has only "Manifest-Version" entry.
